/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/glew.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libGLEW.so.2.3 -o ../../../../lib/libGLEW.so.2.3.1 CMakeFiles/glew.dir/__/__/src/glew.c.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSM.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libICE.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXext.so
